mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_PROPERTY A WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND A.CAT_CD = UPPER(#{catCd})
AND A.DEAL_TYPE = #{dealType}
AND (A.PROP_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR A.ADDRESS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT A.PROP_CD, A.PROP_NM , A.CAT_CD , (SELECT C.CAT_NM FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY C WHERE C.CAT_CD = A.CAT_CD AND C.SUB_CAT_CD = '00') AS CAT_NM , A.DEAL_TYPE , CASE A.DEAL_TYPE WHEN 'SELL' THEN '매매' WHEN 'JEONSE' THEN '전세' WHEN 'WOLSE' THEN '월세' WHEN 'SHORT' THEN '단기임대' ELSE '' END AS DEAL_TYPE_NM , A.SELL_PRICE, A.DEPOSIT, A.MONTHLY_RENT , A.AREA_EXCLUSIVE, A.ROOM_CNT, A.FLOOR_NO , A.ADDRESS, A.BADGE_TYPE , (SELECT CONCAT(F.SAVE_PATH, '/', F.SAVE_FILE_NM) FROM TB_UPLD_FILE F WHERE F.UPLD_FILE_CD COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = A.ATCH_FILE_KEY AND F.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY F.FILE_SEQ ASC LIMIT 1) AS THUMB_PATH FROM TB_PROPERTY A WHERE A.BADGE_TYPE = 'RECOMMEND' AND A.SOLD_YN = 'N' AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.RGT_DTM DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT A.PROP_CD, A.PROP_NM , A.CAT_CD , (SELECT C.CAT_NM FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY C WHERE C.CAT_CD = A.CAT_CD AND C.SUB_CAT_CD = '00') AS CAT_NM , A.DEAL_TYPE , CASE A.DEAL_TYPE WHEN 'SELL' THEN '매매' WHEN 'JEONSE' THEN '전세' WHEN 'WOLSE' THEN '월세' WHEN 'SHORT' THEN '단기임대' ELSE '' END AS DEAL_TYPE_NM , A.SELL_PRICE, A.DEPOSIT, A.MONTHLY_RENT , A.AREA_EXCLUSIVE, A.ROOM_CNT, A.FLOOR_NO , A.ADDRESS, A.BADGE_TYPE , (SELECT CONCAT(F.SAVE_PATH, '/', F.SAVE_FILE_NM) FROM TB_UPLD_FILE F WHERE F.UPLD_FILE_CD COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = A.ATCH_FILE_KEY AND F.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY F.FILE_SEQ ASC LIMIT 1) AS THUMB_PATH FROM TB_PROPERTY A WHERE A.SOLD_YN = 'N' AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.VIEW_CNT DESC, A.RGT_DTM DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT A.PROP_CD, A.PROP_NM , A.CAT_CD , (SELECT C.CAT_NM FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY C WHERE C.CAT_CD = A.CAT_CD AND C.SUB_CAT_CD = '00') AS CAT_NM , A.DEAL_TYPE , CASE A.DEAL_TYPE WHEN 'SELL' THEN '매매' WHEN 'JEONSE' THEN '전세' WHEN 'WOLSE' THEN '월세' WHEN 'SHORT' THEN '단기임대' ELSE '' END AS DEAL_TYPE_NM , A.SELL_PRICE, A.DEPOSIT, A.MONTHLY_RENT , A.AREA_EXCLUSIVE, A.ROOM_CNT, A.FLOOR_NO , A.ADDRESS, A.BADGE_TYPE , (SELECT CONCAT(F.SAVE_PATH, '/', F.SAVE_FILE_NM) FROM TB_UPLD_FILE F WHERE F.UPLD_FILE_CD COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = A.ATCH_FILE_KEY AND F.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY F.FILE_SEQ ASC LIMIT 1) AS THUMB_PATH FROM TB_PROPERTY A WHERE A.BADGE_TYPE = 'URGENT' AND A.SOLD_YN = 'N' AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.RGT_DTM DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT A.PROP_CD, A.PROP_NM , A.CAT_CD , (SELECT C.CAT_NM FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY C WHERE C.CAT_CD = A.CAT_CD AND C.SUB_CAT_CD = '00') AS CAT_NM , A.DEAL_TYPE , CASE A.DEAL_TYPE WHEN 'SELL' THEN '매매' WHEN 'JEONSE' THEN '전세' WHEN 'WOLSE' THEN '월세' WHEN 'SHORT' THEN '단기임대' ELSE '' END AS DEAL_TYPE_NM , A.SELL_PRICE, A.DEPOSIT, A.MONTHLY_RENT , A.AREA_EXCLUSIVE, A.ROOM_CNT, A.FLOOR_NO , A.ADDRESS, A.BADGE_TYPE , (SELECT CONCAT(F.SAVE_PATH, '/', F.SAVE_FILE_NM) FROM TB_UPLD_FILE F WHERE F.UPLD_FILE_CD COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = A.ATCH_FILE_KEY AND F.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY F.FILE_SEQ ASC LIMIT 1) AS THUMB_PATH FROM TB_PROPERTY A WHERE A.SOLD_YN = 'N' AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.RGT_DTM DESC LIMIT 3

SELECT A.* , (SELECT C.CAT_NM FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY C WHERE C.CAT_CD = A.CAT_CD AND C.SUB_CAT_CD = '00') AS CAT_NM , (SELECT C.CAT_NM FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY C WHERE C.CAT_CD = A.CAT_CD AND C.SUB_CAT_CD = A.SUB_CAT_CD) AS SUB_CAT_NM , CASE A.DEAL_TYPE WHEN 'SELL' THEN '매매' WHEN 'JEONSE' THEN '전세' WHEN 'WOLSE' THEN '월세' WHEN 'SHORT' THEN '단기임대' ELSE '' END AS DEAL_TYPE_NM , (SELECT CONCAT(F.SAVE_PATH, '/', F.SAVE_FILE_NM) FROM TB_UPLD_FILE F WHERE F.UPLD_FILE_CD COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = A.ATCH_FILE_KEY AND F.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY F.FILE_SEQ ASC LIMIT 1) AS THUMB_PATH , DATE_FORMAT(A.RGT_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS RGT_DTM_FMT FROM TB_PROPERTY A WHERE A.PROP_CD = #{id} AND A.DEL_YN = 'N'

SELECT F.UPLD_FILE_CD , F.FILE_SEQ , CONCAT(F.SAVE_PATH, '/', F.SAVE_FILE_NM) AS IMG_PATH FROM TB_UPLD_FILE F INNER JOIN TB_PROPERTY A ON A.ATCH_FILE_KEY COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = F.UPLD_FILE_CD WHERE A.PROP_CD = #{id} AND F.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY F.FILE_SEQ ASC
